_notes: Maps Mercury deposit names -> Cotto account, so unreferenced lump payments reconcile to AR. Matched by case-insensitive substring against the deposit description/reference/note. account_merge collapses accounts that pay together. non_ar = deposits that are NOT customer payments (prizes, refunds, founder transfers). Add an entry whenever a new payment source appears; NEVER guess an org - flag it for Kendall.
